---
title: ""
---

<div class="home-grid"> 

<div class="home-photo">
<img src="images/profile.jpg" alt="Professional headshot of Sara Baji">
</div>

<div class="home-intro">

# Sara Baji

I’m an MPH student in Global Epidemiology and Data Science at Emory University.

My work focuses on using data, epidemiologic methods, and digital health tools to better understand health outcomes and improve healthcare systems.

I have experience in health analytics, infectious disease surveillance, program evaluation, and data visualization.

<a class="button" href="projects.html">View My Projects</a>

</div>

</div>
